## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Folio PDF.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why do you need it? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail:

- API changes (if any)
- New classes/methods
- Changes to existing functionality
- Template language changes (if applicable)

**Example usage:**
```php
// Show how the feature would be used
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
